name.description: Full name - must be a string and is required

geschlecht.description: Gender code - must be M, W, or D and is required

email.description: Email address - must be a valid email string pattern and is required

telefon.description: Phone number - must be a string

geburtsdatum.description: Date of birth - must be a date and is required

eintrittsdatum.description: Joining date - must be a date and is required

strasse.description: Street name - must be a string and is required

plz.description: Postal code - must be an integer and is required

ort.description: City - must be a string and is required

kurs_id.description: FK referencing the course - must be an objectId and is required

anmeldedatum.description: Registration date - must be a date and is required

status.description: Status - must be aktiv, storniert, or warteliste and is required
